use_cases: Displaying rotating product feature highlights on landing pages with animated transitions
Showcasing key value propositions with glass-morphism styling and iconography
Creating interactive feature cards that auto-cycle through benefits every 2 seconds
Building visually engaging product or service showcases with backdrop blur effects
Adding animated feature sections to SaaS dashboards or marketing sites
ai_summary: A dynamic feature showcase component featuring rotating chips with glass-morphism styling and backdrop blur effects. Uses Framer Motion for smooth 60fps animations and auto-cycles through feature highlights every 2 seconds. Includes icons from Hugeicons library and supports responsive layouts with mobile detection.
